one_time_description: Forgiveness of treaty negotiations loan during the year
economic_notes: Takla Development Corporation involved in logging and silviculture. Takla Lake Limited Partnership generated $8.5M in revenues. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with potential future financial impact. Post year-end $900,000 distribution approved for members.
notes: 4 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Takla Development Corporation (100%), Sasuchan Development Corporation (100%), Takla Lake Limited Partnership (99.90%), Tse Keh Nay LLP (33.33%). Treaty negotiations loan of $1,575,579 forgiven during the year - significant one-time item. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $3,990,698 + FNHA $900,134 + CMHC $122,626 + Province of BC $1,518,108 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $493,812 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $8,678,592 + FNESC $344,007 = $16,047,977 less own source $3,927,916; note deferred revenue change of $341,029 complicates OSR calculation. Annual surplus includes $90,496 recovery from ISC and excludes distributions. COVID-19 subsequent event: $900,000 member distribution approved after year-end. No schedule of remuneration provided.
